description: Promotion gates for moving Lumenary observations from draft research into public claims.

review_candidate.label: Review Candidate
review_candidate.description: Strong enough for internal review, but not a public claim.

public_claim.label: Public Claim
public_claim.description: May be presented publicly as a claim, with visible critique and epistemic labels.

synthesis_ready.label: Synthesis Ready
synthesis_ready.description: Strong enough to seed a longer essay or public synthesis.
